message:
chore: bump core to v0.1.2 and index to v0.1.2 for crates.io republish

frankensearch-core v0.1.1 was missing daemon/sync trait exports
(DaemonClient, DaemonError, SyncEmbed, SyncRerank, etc.) and
frankensearch-index v0.1.1 had stale method name (quality_scores_for_indices
vs quality_scores_for_hits). Bumped both to v0.1.2 to publish current code.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "frankensearch-core"
-version = "0.1.1"
+version = "0.1.2"
 description = "Core traits, types, and error types for frankensearch"
 edition.workspace = true
 license-file.workspace = true

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "frankensearch-index"
-version = "0.1.1"
+version = "0.1.2"
 description = "FSVI vector index, SIMD dot product, and top-k search for frankensearch"
 edition.workspace = true
 license-file.workspace = true
